results.rendered_html:
pṛthvī [pṛthu-ṅīṣ]
1 The earth.
2 The earth as one of the five elements.
3 Large cardamoms.
4 N. of a metre; (see App. I.)
Comp.
(pb)
— īśaḥ, -patiḥ, -pālaḥ, -bhuj m. a king, sovereign.
— khātaṃ a cavern.
— garbhaḥ an epithet of Gaṇeśa.
— gṛhaṃ a cave, grotto.
— jaḥ
1 a tree.
2 the planet Mars.
— dharaḥ a mountain.
